data.body: Investigation (INTERMEDIATE, opus): blue-team-filter sub-agent has no shell access; it cannot resolve $ARTIFACTS_DIR via get_artifacts_dir, so the LLM fabricates a repo-relative path (.claude/artifacts/...) which ends up in git working tree. Fix is LLM-behavioral: orchestrator resolves ARTIFACTS_DIR before dispatch and passes absolute path as task argument. Agent file must be updated to forbid fabricated paths and reference the supplied {artifacts-dir}. Same pattern may exist in red-team-reviewer. ESCALATE: agent file content edit (plugins/dso/agents/blue-team-filter.md) + skill edit (preplanning SKILL.md Step 2); requires user approval.
